subject: Project pulse: urban takeover execution in Brisbane | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-6701
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in Brisbane. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Albert Einstein and Amelia Earhart as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-6701. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: delivery, drop-bears.
